title: Rechargeable Electric Lighter, Windproof, Flameless with Safety Protector and USB Cable

Gift Box - This electronic is a perfect gift and comes complete with gift box and safety instructions.
description: Fully rechargeable windproof electronic lighter. This flameless lighter can be used under all weather conditions. It comes complete with USB cable for charging, gift box and safety instruction manual.
